mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, name, callback_url, event_types, secret, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from batch.webhook_subscription where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and is_deleted = false order by name
select from batch.webhook_subscription where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false limit 1
select from batch.webhook_subscription where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and name = #{name} and is_deleted = false limit 1
select from batch.webhook_subscription where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true and is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into batch.webhook_subscription ( tenant_id, name, callback_url, event_types, secret, enabled, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{name}, #{callbackUrl}, #{eventTypes}, #{secret}, #{enabled}, #{operator}, #{operator} ) on conflict (tenant_id, name) do update set callback_url = excluded.callback_url, event_types = excluded.event_types, secret = excluded.secret, enabled = excluded.enabled, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, is_deleted = false, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.update: update batch.webhook_subscription set callback_url = #{callbackUrl}, event_types = #{eventTypes}, secret = #{secret}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{operator}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update batch.webhook_subscription set is_deleted = true, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
